# Harsh Rathore

> Technical Architect at Metafic, based in Bengaluru, India. Designs, architects,
> and ships high-scale web & mobile products end-to-end with React, React Native,
> and Node.js, specializing in system design, full-stack backend engineering, and
> production-grade GenAI integration.

## Professional

- Current role: Technical Architect at Metafic (since Nov 2025; at Metafic since Jan 2021,
  progressing from React Native Intern → React Native Developer → Mobile Development
  Lead → Engineering Lead → Technical Architect).
- Expertise: software architecture, React, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript,
  system design, CI/CD for mobile, LLM-powered product features.

## Selected projects

- Dallal (dallal.com.kw) — scale-driven real estate platform for the Kuwaiti market;
  architected the end-to-end system topology.
- Artrivi (artrivi.com) — end-to-end AI research-paper writing platform; designed the
  prompt orchestration layer and document assembly pipelines.
- Fintech wealth platform (private client) — engineered a secure, data-dense frontend
  for real-time financial data visualization.
- Caprics Learning Lab (capricslearninglab.com) — e-learning platform; directed the
  engineering team.
- SnapBack Returns (iOS, App Store id6479014048) — fullstack engineer.

## Personal

- Traveller and trekker: 6 countries (India, Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia,
  Vietnam) and 15 Indian states; volcano treks at Mt. Ijen and Mt. Bromo; Beas Kund
  trek in Himachal (12,772 ft). Home town: Indore, MP.
- Music lover (live top artists/tracks on the site) and CS2 player.
